name: /prompt-ab refuses to compare two non-existent versions of the same prompt
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" x v1.0.0 v9.9.9 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_version' err.txt && grep -q 'v9.9.9' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
